name: Pollo Loco Marinade.
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Place chicken pieces in a resealable plastic bag or shallow dish and pour the marinade over the chicken, ensuring it is well-coated.
3. Refrigerate the marinated chicken for 4 to 24 hours.
4. Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
5. Grill chicken for 20 minutes on each side until cooked through.
6. Serve grilled chicken with flour tortillas and fresh salsa. Enjoy!
